---
title: "RPBio — Registered Professional Biologist (College of Applied Biology)"
subtitle: "What you need from your UBCO Freshwater Science degree"
date: last-modified
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold placeholder
This page is a scaffold. The authoritative course mapping comes from the
[CAB Credentialing Standard (June 2025)](https://cab-bc.org/wp-content/uploads/Credentialing_Standard_June-2025.pdf).
That PDF is image-based and needs to be OCR'd into a curated YAML before
this page can render the actual list. See `data-raw/03_ocr_cab_rpbio_list.R`.
:::

# The designation

The **RPBio** (Registered Professional Biologist) is granted by the
[College of Applied Biology](https://cab-bc.org/), the regulatory body
for applied biology professionals in British Columbia.

## Academic eligibility (Streams 1 and 2)

Per the June 2025 Credentialing Standard:

- A bachelor's or master's degree with **25 science courses, 13 of
  which are in biology**.
- **At least three** of those biology courses must be from:
  genetics, cellular biology, physiology, systematics, or evolution.

## Work experience and professional work products

- **Streams 1 and 2** require a minimum of **three years of work
  experience** in applied biology within the last 10 years.
- **Stream 3** allows entry with the same 25 science courses plus
  **15 years of practice** experience in applied biology.
- You must submit at least one **scientific or risk-assessment
  report** that meets College criteria, plus at least one **public-
  facing communication piece** (annotated presentation, briefing note,
  interpretation document).

## How your Freshwater Science degree maps

::: {.callout-tip}
## When this is wired up
The interactive planner cross-checks your completed-courses list
against the CAB biology categories and flags which of the five
required-area courses you have versus still need (genetics, cellular,
physiology, systematics, evolution).
:::

## References

- [RPBio Requirements (CAB)](https://cab-bc.org/applicant-self-assessment-tool-general-information/applicant-self-assessment-tool/rpbio-form/)
- [Credentialing Standard (June 2025 PDF)](https://cab-bc.org/wp-content/uploads/Credentialing_Standard_June-2025.pdf)
- [College of Applied Biology Act](https://www.bclaws.gov.bc.ca/civix/document/id/consol14/consol14/00_02068_01)
